# Imed Ben Fatma - Tunisian Freelance Software Engineer & Full Stack Developer

Personal portfolio and professional index of Imed Ben Fatma, an Arabic software engineer freelance and Tunisian full stack developer freelance based in Monastir, Tunisia. 

Imed is a highly experienced computer engineer and ingénieur informatique freelance who designs, develops, and maintains enterprise-grade web applications, custom ERP systems, and CRM solutions.

- **Primary URL**: https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site
- **Location**: Monastir, Tunisia (Tunisie)
- **Role**: Software Engineer, Computer Engineer, Full Stack Developer Freelance, ERP Developer, CRM Developer
- **Availability**: Remote contract opportunities globally (Tunisia freelance / freelance Tunisie / Tunisia full-stack developer freelance / Tunisie full-stack developer freelance / freelance tunisien / freelance Tunisia).

## Core Navigation & Pages

- [Homepage](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/) - Professional profile, core pillars, dynamic FAQ, and contact channels.
- [Online CV](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/cv) - Detailed curriculum vitae showing computer engineering qualifications, academic path, and professional history.
- [B-CAR Project](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/projects/b-car) - Smart mobility & fleet ecosystem developed using Spring Boot, Angular, Flutter, and PostgreSQL.
- [novoPharma Project](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/projects/novopharma) - B2B quiz-loyalty app and administration logistics portal developed with Flutter, Next.js, and Firebase.
- [QA Projects](https://www.imed-ben-fatma.site/projects/qa) - Automated testing suite (Selenium, Cucumber BDD, JUnit 5) integrated into CI/CD pipelines.

## External Profiles

- [GitHub Profile](https://github.com/Imed-Ben-Fatma) - Open-source repositories and development work.
- [LinkedIn Profile](https://www.linkedin.com/in/imed-ben-fatma-061b101a3/) - Corporate network and direct messaging.

## Professional Competencies

- **Full Stack Development**: Building scalable applications with Spring Boot (Java), Next.js, Angular, React.js, TypeScript.
- **Enterprise Solutions (ERP & CRM)**: Acting as a specialized ERP developer and CRM developer to customize business logistics, audits, and automated systems.
- **Mobile Development**: Crafting cross-platform apps using Flutter and Dart.
- **Software Quality Assurance (QA)**: Designing automated E2E testing systems (Selenium, JUnit, Cucumber BDD) and API validations (Postman/Newman) integrated into Jenkins pipelines.
- **Systems Engineering**: Database query tuning (PostgreSQL, MySQL, Oracle DB, SQL Server), containerization (Docker), and legacy code maintenance.
